name: Control Wires
flavor: Near-invisible monofilament strung from the fingertips — it cuts, it binds, and it answers the puppeteer's will as readily as it answers his hand. In close it threatens with a duelist's reach; at distance the wires snap taut across the room to open a wound where no blade could reach. Special: you may attack with it as a melee weapon (10 ft reach) OR as a ranged weapon (range 30/60 ft), your choice each attack — a hit lets the Strings engine attach a free String at that range.

parryProfile.note: The one weapon that can parry ranged attacks as well as melee — a curtain of wire snaps up to turn aside blade or bolt alike. The Puppeteer's only real defense, though his very high Parry DC means even this rarely lands a Full Dodge. Signature to the Puppeteer.
